name: microskills
description: Composable microskills + workflows engine + dynamic AI harness. Exposes a single command — initialize-harness — that bootstraps a project's runtime from the plugin catalog; every other dispatcher, script, agent, and per-component shim is materialized into the project's .claude/ at init. The catalog (microskills, workflow-defs, agents, scripts, dispatcher skills) ships as dormant data and is never auto-registered.
